scripts.kill: for port in 3000 3002 3011; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done; sleep 1; echo 'Ports 3000, 3002, 3011 cleared'
scripts.dev: npm run kill && concurrently -k -n web,mcp -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w mcp"
